LAW AND MOTION 301, DEMURRER - NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- CROSS-DEFENDANT ROBERT O. NABOYEV'S DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF ANSWER -- DEMURRER IS OVERRULED, MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED AS TO PARAGRAPH 6, PAGE 3, LINE 8, WHICH RECITES: "AND BY REPUNDIATING THE CONTRACT BY BRINGING AN ACTION AGAINST CROSS-COMPLAINANT FOR RESCISSION...", OTHERWISE DENIED, 20 DAYS TO ANSWER. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
